title: JNTUK CSE Complete Placement Preparation
description: Comprehensive placement preparation guide for JNTUK B.Tech CSE students covering aptitude, coding, technical MCQs, HR interviews, and company-specific strategies for TCS, Infosys, Wipro, Cognizant, Accenture, and product-based companies.
